body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2025-6050", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 4.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:H/UI:P/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:L/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "Mezzanine CMS, in versions prior to 6.1.1, contains a Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the admin interface. The vulnerability exists in the \"displayable_links_js\" function, which fails to properly sanitize blog post titles before including them in JSON responses served via \"/admin/displayable_links.js\". An authenticated admin user can create a blog post with a malicious JavaScript payload in the title field, then trick another admin user into clicking a direct link to the \"/admin/displayable_links.js\" endpoint, causing the malicious script to execute in their browser.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00263, "percentile": 0.17509}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7pr5-w74r-jjj7", "github_reviewed_at": "2025-06-17T15:38:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7pr5-w74r-jjj7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7pr5-w74r-jjj7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-6050"}], "nvd_published_at": "2025-06-17T11:15:22Z", "published_at": "2025-06-17T12:31:15Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-6050", "https://github.com/stephenmcd/mezzanine/discussions/2080", "https://https://github.com/stephenmcd/mezzanine/commit/898630d8df48cf3ddb8b9942f59168b93216e3f8", "https://github.com/stephenmcd/mezzanine/commit/898630d8df48cf3ddb8b9942f59168b93216e3f8", "https://advisory.checkmarx.net/advisory/CVE-2025-6050", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7pr5-w74r-jjj7", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/mezzanine/PYSEC-2025-236.yaml"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/stephenmcd/mezzanine", "summary": "Mezzanine CMS has a Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the displayable_links_js function", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-20T21:22:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7pr5-w74r-jjj7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.1.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "Mezzanine"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
